title: Abbott Products and Solutions List
note: Official product list showing Abbott's major product areas and references to FreeStyle Libre and Ensure.

title: Abbott 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual-report source for Abbott's business segments, performance context, and nutrition and medical-device discussion.

title: Abbott Laboratories Market Cap
note: Market-data source reporting Abbott's market capitalization near the May 2026 snapshot date.

title: Abbott Laboratories Stock Price and Overview
note: Market-data source for trailing revenue, net income, sector, exchange, and company profile metrics.

title: Abbott Laboratories P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for Abbott's May 2026 trailing P/E ratio and public-company valuation context.

title: Welcome to Nightscout
note: Documentation for Nightscout as an open-source CGM data visualization, storage, and sharing system.

title: Nightscout GitHub Organization
note: Public repositories for Nightscout, cgm-remote-monitor, AndroidAPS, and related open-source diabetes tooling.

title: AndroidAPS Documentation
note: Documentation for AndroidAPS as an open-source app for people living with insulin-dependent diabetes.

title: Open Food Facts API Documentation
note: Documentation for the Open Food Facts API, used as evidence for open nutrition-product data and contribution workflows.
